## PrimitiveTypeNode interface

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
> 

Primitive types mapping directly to JSON Schema primitives.

Note: integer is NOT a primitive kind — integer semantics are expressed via a `multipleOf: 1` constraint on a number type.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface PrimitiveTypeNode 
```
